cases.description: A trailing comma omits the required second positional argument. VBE Compile rejects this as a syntax error.
cases.source:
Public Function InvoiceTotal(ByVal Subtotal As Currency, ByVal TaxRate As Double) As Currency
    InvoiceTotal = Subtotal + (Subtotal * TaxRate)
End Function

Public Sub XlideOracleEntry()
    Dim total As Double
    Dim total2 As Double
    total = 100
    total2 = InvoiceTotal(total, )
End Sub
